pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind dependency with jakarta.xml.bind for Jakarta EE namespace compliance.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind is removed from the JDK and often unavailable in modern Jakarta EE environments; code expecting Jakarta namespaces will fail to compile or link.
